description: This cap from puma is a perfect blend of comfort and style. Wear it in the summer and keep yourself safe from the sun. Crown made of 100% polyester fabric Curved visor with stitch detailing on the periphery Velcro strap at the back with a brand tag for a customised Fit Printed puma cat logo on the front of the crown for style Mesh panel on either side of the crown Care Hand wash in warm water at 40 degrees Do not wring, bleach, iron or dry clean Line dry
